label: Transparent snow leopard motif
prompt:
Use case: background-extraction
Asset type: isolated Morphous catalog motif source for transparent PNG
Primary request: Create an isolated snow leopard motif for a design system named Morphous Snow Leopard.
Scene/backdrop: perfectly flat solid #00ff00 chroma-key background for background removal. The background must be one uniform color with no shadows, gradients, texture, reflections, floor plane, or lighting variation.
Subject: a graceful snow leopard in a compact alert standing pose, full body visible, smoke grey and off-white winter coat, black rosettes, thick tail curled in an elegant S curve, quiet watchful expression, high mountain predator presence.
Style: refined semi-realistic digital illustration with crisp fur silhouette, premium catalog asset, natural anatomy, detailed rosette pattern, clean edge separation.
Composition: centered, generous padding on all sides, no crop, no cast shadow, no contact shadow, no reflection.
Avoid: do not use #00ff00 anywhere in the subject, no text, no watermark, no extra animals, no scenery, no snow particles, no background texture.

label: Light design-system board
prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: 16:9 high-resolution Morphous design-system board, light mode
Primary request: Create a comprehensive design-system board for "Morphous Snow Leopard", a quiet security system theme derived from an isolated snow leopard motif.
Motif source: smoke grey and off-white snow leopard coat, charcoal black rosettes, snow highlights, high mountain atmosphere, quiet alert security posture.
Canvas: 16:9 design board, target 3840x2160, crisp readable labels, professional product-design presentation.
Visual direction: light mode with snowfield background, warm off-white surfaces, smoke grey ink, charcoal rosette accents, glacial blue focus states, muted alpine sage success, restrained warning and destructive colors. Avoid generic purple/blue gradients and avoid one-note monochrome.
Required sections: large motif preview; palette swatches with names and hex-like labels; typography guidance for English and Japanese (include headings, body, code, Japanese UI copy guidance); component library including buttons, inputs, selects, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, table, command/search, tooltip/popover, modal; navigation examples with sidebar and topbar; dashboard/data area with KPI cards, audit log table, line/bar/donut charts for quiet security monitoring; forms and validation states; empty, error, loading states; texture panel showing snow-leopard rosette pattern; spacing/radius/shadow token scale; sample usage screen.
Composition: organized dense but readable UI-kit board, multiple full-width bands and panels, no nested decorative cards, 8px or smaller radii, crisp icons, exact board title "Morphous Snow Leopard" and subtitle "quiet security system".
Text quality: keep labels short, large, legible; include English and Japanese guidance visibly.
Avoid: no watermark, no mock browser chrome dominance, no illegible microtext, no unrelated saturated colors.

label: Dark design-system board
prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: 16:9 high-resolution Morphous design-system board, dark mode
Primary request: Create a separate comprehensive dark-mode design-system board for "Morphous Snow Leopard", matching the light Morphous Snow Leopard system but translated to a quiet security system dark theme.
Motif source: smoke grey and off-white snow leopard coat, charcoal black rosettes, snow highlights, high mountain night atmosphere, quiet alert security posture.
Canvas: 16:9 design board, target 3840x2160, crisp readable labels, professional product-design presentation.
Visual direction: dark mode with charcoal basalt background, graphite cards, frosted snow ink, smoke grey borders, black rosette pattern accents, glacial blue focus states, alpine sage success, restrained amber warning and cold red destructive states. Avoid generic purple/blue gradients and avoid flat monochrome.
Required sections: large motif preview; dark palette swatches with names and hex-like labels; typography guidance for English and Japanese (include headings, body, code, Japanese UI copy guidance); component library including buttons, inputs, selects, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, table, command/search, tooltip/popover, modal; navigation examples with sidebar and topbar; dashboard/data area with KPI cards, audit log table, line/bar/donut charts for quiet security monitoring; forms and validation states; empty, error, loading states; texture panel showing subtle snow-leopard rosette pattern; spacing/radius/shadow token scale; sample usage screen.
Composition: organized dense but readable UI-kit board, multiple full-width bands and panels, no nested decorative cards, 8px or smaller radii, crisp icons, exact board title "Morphous Snow Leopard" and subtitle "quiet security system".
Text quality: keep labels short, large, legible; include English and Japanese guidance visibly.
Avoid: no watermark, no mock browser chrome dominance, no illegible microtext, no unrelated saturated colors.
